## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve, or what milestone does it advance?

## Testing

How was this tested? (e.g. `make bench`, ran against demo stack, unit tested parsers)

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo check` passes
- [ ] No new compiler warnings
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` status table updated if a module status changed
- [ ] New protocol additions follow the steps in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
